overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Little China district of Night City. The player moves from a shaded underpass through open streets lined with palm trees and digital billboards, then into narrow neon-lit alleys and a covered market area. The scene features bright midday sunlight with strong shadows and vibrant neon signage characteristic of the cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: exiting the shadowed underpass into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered concrete walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered walls and approaching the street exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating deep shadows over the walkway
tall concrete barrier wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
smooth concrete retaining wall with metal railings on top

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The walls are covered in graffiti and street art. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead as the camera moves forward toward the bright exit, transitioning from deep shadow to harsh sunlight at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection in commercial district

events.description: crossing the asphalt street at the intersection while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass into the open street and crossing the road toward the Little China district, passing palm trees and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street in the background

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street median in planters
large vertical array of glowing digital advertisements and neon signs on building facade
tall contemporary skyscrapers with reflective glass windows
illuminated district sign indicating Little China neighborhood

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into bright midday sun, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection. Palm trees line the street while massive digital billboards display advertisements on the right. The camera crosses the asphalt road toward the Little China district, passing modern glass towers and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

events.description: turning into a narrow alleyway with green flooring and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along a green-tiled sidewalk past vibrant neon storefronts and digital advertisements, following a pedestrian in a brown coat

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long brown coat walking ahead into the alley

entered.detail: bright neon signs and illuminated store displays lining the sidewalk
distinctive green tiled pedestrian walkway with red curbs
tall illuminated pillar displaying purple beverage advertisement with '16 FLAVORS' text
external HVAC units and ventilation equipment mounted on building walls

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow sidewalk with distinctive green tiling, passing vibrant neon storefronts and a large purple advertising pillar. The environment shifts from open street to enclosed alleyway as the player follows a pedestrian past air conditioning units and trash bags toward a darker passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market courtyard with industrial elements

events.description: entering the dimly lit covered market area with neon-lit stalls

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into a dark alleyway and entering a covered market courtyard with industrial piping and neon lighting

entered.detail: enclosed market hall with roof structure and multiple levels
market vendor stalls illuminated by colorful neon lighting
large industrial ventilation fans and exhaust systems on the walls
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends into a dimly lit alley and enters a covered market courtyard. Industrial ventilation fans and overhead walkways dominate the space above, while neon-lit market stalls line the sides. The environment shifts from natural to artificial lighting as the camera explores the enclosed commercial area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shadowed urban underpass into the bright, neon-saturated commercial heart of the Little China district. It begins in a dim pedestrian walkway beneath a concrete highway overpass, moving past graffiti-covered walls toward a blinding exit of harsh midday sunlight. As the camera emerges into the open air, the scene expands into a wide intersection featuring palm trees, glass towers, and massive digital billboards before crossing the asphalt toward the city center. The environment then shifts from the open street to a narrow sidewalk with green tiling and purple advertising pillars, gradually tightening as the camera follows a pedestrian into a shadowed alleyway. Finally, the natural light fades completely as the camera enters a covered market courtyard dominated by industrial ventilation fans and vibrant, artificial neon stalls.
